intro: Lepidoseris recognita, also known as the recognized Lepidoseris, is a perennial succulent plant species native to the Canary Islands. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, protecting against cell damage, and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
